title: Trump says Iran ceasefire is on 'massive life support'
summary_full: The US president criticises an Iranian counteroffer to end the war, and says the month-long ceasefire is "unbelievably weak".
summary_public: The US president criticises an Iranian counteroffer to end the war, and says the month-long ceasefire is "unbelievably weak".

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: Trump says Iran ceasefire is on 'massive life support'
